subcodes.first_line: O steadfast and firm one! Thy letter was received and served as a manifest proof of thy firmness of step upon this path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت مستقیم نامه شما رسید دلیل جلیل بر ثبوت قدم در این سبیل بود و
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of dreams and visions, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @growth of the Cause, @light and darkness
